pandoc 
  to: html
  output-file: index.html
  standalone: true
  self-contained: true
  section-divs: true
  html-math-method: mathjax
  wrap: none
  default-image-extension: png
  reference-location: margin
  toc: true
  number-sections: true
  variables: {}
  
metadata
  document-css: false
  link-citations: true
  date-format: long
  lang: en
  title: My first website
  author: Ottavia
  affiliation: Psicostat
  bibliography:
    - biblio.bib
  citation-location: margin
  toc-location: left
  grid:
    sidebar-width: 200px
    body-width: 900px
    margin-width: 400px
    gutter-width: 1.5rem
  theme:
    light: minty
    dark: superhero

Output created: index.html
